ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(Stage__c) && TEXT(Stage__c) = 'Agreement' && ( Aadhaar_Uploaded__c = false || Pan_Uploaded__c = false || Applicant_Photo_Uploaded__c = false || Proof_of_Address_Uploaded__c = false)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please upload the all KYC documents before mark the Stage as Agreement.
